title: Inch Converter
shortDescription: Convert inches to cm, mm and feet online with a flexible browser-based unit converter.
metaTitle: Inch Converter | Inches, cm, mm and feet
metaDescription: Use this inch converter to switch between inches, centimeters, millimeters and feet online. Great for generic inch conversion searches.
intro: This inch converter is designed for broad searches where people want a quick answer instead of a one-direction page. Convert inches, centimeters, millimeters and feet from one tool and flip directions without opening a second calculator.
overview: Use the converter for product measurements, DIY dimensions, print work and international size checks. It covers the most common inch-related unit pairs while keeping the workflow simple enough for fast mobile or desktop use.
howItWorks: Enter the number you want to convert.
Pick the starting unit and target unit.
Read the result instantly and swap the direction when you need the reverse conversion.

examples.title: Inches to centimeters
examples.description: Helpful for product specs, packaging and screen sizes.

examples.title: Feet to inches
examples.description: Useful in room planning and building measurements.

faq.question: Which units are included?
faq.answer: The tool supports inches, centimeters, millimeters and feet.

faq.question: Can I use it for reverse conversions too?
faq.answer: Yes. You can change the source and target units at any time in the same form.
